vllm.title: [BugFix] [Kernel] Add Cutlass2x fallback kernels
vllm.author: varun-sundar-rabindranath
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Bug : In cases when the GPU isn't able to accommodate the Shared Memory requirements of some Cutlass Gemm Op, Cutlass fails with a RuntimeError: Error Internal.
At the moment main fails the tests/kernels/test_cutlass.py  on a A4000 GPU.
Fix: This PR adds a mechanism to fallback to a lenient Gemm Op

vllm.title: [Distributed] Add send and recv helpers

cc: @youkaichao @stephanie-wang @simon-mo
